alt: wave picking project is a WMS solution that optimizes order fulfillment
title: Wave Picking Project
desc: A Wave Picking Project is a warehouse management project that optimizes order fulfillment by grouping similar orders into waves for efficient, batch-based picking. It improves picker productivity, reduces travel time, and enhances throughput across the supply chain

alt: cycle count project is a WMS solution focused on improving inventory accuracy through scheduled
title: Cycle Count Project
desc: Cycle Count Project is a warehouse management project focused on improving inventory accuracy through scheduled, systematic stock verification without disrupting daily operations. It enhances supply chain efficiency by reducing discrepancies, supporting real-time data integrity, and enabling informed decision-making
